name: agent-route-studio
description: AgentRoute Studio autonomous agent control plane

scripts.lint: eslint --no-config-lookup --parser-options '{"ecmaVersion":"latest","sourceType":"module","ecmaFeatures":{"jsx":true}}' src/*.js src/agent/**/*.js src/core/**/*.js src/config/**/*.js src/storage/**/*.js src/tools/**/*.js src/security/**/*.js src/shared/**/*.js src/lib/**/*.js src/store/**/*.js app/**/*.js scripts/*.js
scripts.test: node src/security-regression.test.js && node src/config-loader.test.js && node src/storage-repositories.test.js && node src/tools-runtime.test.js && node src/provider-oauth-runtime.test.js && node src/agent-evidence.test.js && node src/agent-verification-file-intent.test.js && node src/agent-authenticity.test.js && node src/agent-corrective.test.js && node src/agent-action-decision.test.js && node src/agent-action-learning.test.js && node src/agent-decision-attribution.test.js && node src/agent-recovery.test.js && node src/agent-document-generation.test.js && node src/agent-route-dashboard.test.js && node src/agent-orchestration.test.js && node src/agent-route-task-runtime.test.js && node src/agent-route-memory-runtime.test.js && node src/agent-route-model-proxy.test.js && node src/agent-route-observability-runtime.test.js && node src/agent-mcp-server.test.js && node src/agent-mcp-worker-client.test.js && node src/agent-langgraph-runner.test.js

comment_better_sqlite3: kept in optionalDependencies so npm install doesn't fail on systems without build tools; provider persistence reports a clear error when SQLite is unavailable
